summary: Verified the 'AdminLeads is not defined' runtime error is fully resolved. Home page, /admin, /admin/leads all render without console/page errors, and admin login with token 'apex-admin-2026' successfully renders the admin dashboard with stat cards and the leads table.
passed: Home page loads after cinematic loader; title 'Apex Media — AI Powered Digital Growth Partner in Dubai, UAE'; hero/services/etc content present
Zero AdminLeads-related console or page errors across all routes
/admin renders the admin-login form (data-testid='admin-login') without runtime errors
/admin/leads renders the same admin-login form without runtime errors
Submitting token 'apex-admin-2026' renders [data-testid='admin-dashboard'] with 7 stat-card elements and a leads table
Apex AI chat launcher visible on both home and dashboard (no regressions observed)
notes: Cinematic loader takes ~6-7s on every route (including /admin and /admin/leads). Initial 3s waits returned no form; extended to 8s and form was found. No code changes made; only test waits were adjusted.
